posts.author: Billymo (Billy Mohan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I was wondering if anyone had a solution for the below issues I’m having.

We’ve created a board to manage our customer services request, which come through using an Gmail integration. Every time a new email is received, an item is created in the board. However, I’d like to pull the email address from the incoming email and add it as a column.

THanks,

Billy
